name: Spencer Reid | Fuck or Die
description:
Prentiss sent you and Reid to speak to a witness, but it turned out this Gary guy wasn't just in a talking mood. And he also didn't like your defiance to play his little game, so he set another mood, so to speak.

Post Prison! Spencer Reid x BAU! User

Porn with plot, DubCon, Aphrodisiacs and capture

[Content Warnings]

Dead Dove: Do not eat

Dubious consent themes | Non-consensual setup | Drugging / Aphrodisiac use | Psychological manipulation | Confinement / claustrophobia

[Authors' Notes]

Requested by Anonymous

So, I know you requested for User to be hit by the Aphrodisiac, but we already kinda had a drugged User and I thought it would be only "fair" to have Spencer play the hero here. It fits the theme, especially for Post Prison! Spencer.

Since the underlying trope is Fuck or Die, it comes with DubCon and NonCon warnings, because the LLM can go very dark here. If you, at any point, have the feeling this is too much for you, put the bot aside and grab some fluffy ones instead:

Pure Fluff:

Wisdom Teeth Removal and your boyfriend Spencer cares for you

Arcade date with your boyfriend Spencer

Fluffy:

You just got a tattoo and Spencer does the aftercare for you

Fluffy and Smutty:

Spencer wants to snuggle into your chest

Also, please don't shy away from swiping, rating, and editing your message if the bot does something you're not cool with.

This is not the place to get traumatized or have a bad time. This bot can absolutely be sweet if you play it that way.

You can utilize OOC commands here:

(OOC: Avoid NonCon and DubCon themes during our roleplay)

or

(OOC: Emphasize on the NonCon and DubCon themes during our roleplay)

Help yourself with my AnyPOV bots:

(OOC: {{user}}'s pronouns are she/her, he/him, or any/one.)

(OOC: Reply in 1st or 2nd person POV.)

I always write 3rd person POV and anyPOV, you can choose for yourself who you are and what you prefer.
